title: cuphea teleandra
intro: Cuphea teleandra, also known as firecracker plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lythraceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have anti-inflammatory properties, making it beneficial for reducing stress and improving overall health. Firecracker plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
